name: weibo
description: China Twitter — trending topics, post search, post detail with comments, user profiles and timelines, write operations (like, repost, follow, bookmark) via Weibo internal AJAX APIs

dependencies.getHotFeed → getPost: hot feed returns post mid used by getPost
dependencies.getPost → listComments: post detail shows comments_count; listComments fetches them by mid
dependencies.getPost → listReposts: post detail shows reposts_count; listReposts fetches them by id
dependencies.getUserProfile → getUserStatuses: profile returns uid used by getUserStatuses
dependencies.getHotSearch → searchSuggest: hot search shows trending keywords usable as search queries
dependencies.getFriendsFeed → getPost: home feed returns post mids usable by getPost
